nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

nodes.name: VU
nodes.summary: VU表示 IUCN 易危等级，当前关联694种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、索马里鸵鸟、大斑几维鸟等694种鸟类。

nodes.name: Scaly ground roller
nodes.summary: Scaly ground roller（Scaly ground roller，学名 Geobiastes squamiger），在图谱中标记为易危（VU）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、气候变化。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The scaly ground roller is threatened by habitat loss and is considered by IUCN to be a vulnerable species. Although threatened by removal of its ecological niche, it is more resilient to climate change and forest conversion effects than other similar species
